error_signature: flow resumes after the first batch’s emails are returned
title: Webhook flow resumes prematurely after first batch
symptom: The workflow continues after receiving the first batch's emails, ignoring subsequent batches. No separate execution is created for the second batch.
applies_when: Using HTTP node for batch requests
root_cause: The workflow is designed to process items in parallel by default, which causes it to resume after the first webhook response is received. This results in subsequent batches not being processed as intended.
fix_steps: Add a Loop Over Items node after the Code node
Set the Loop Over Items node to process one item at a time
Place the HTTP Request and Wait nodes inside the loop
agent_instruction: Implement a Loop Over Items node to process each batch sequentially.
